name: Karula Co.,LTD.
summary: Karula Co.,LTD. operates Japanese style family restaurants in Japan. As of September 30, 2020, it operated 120 stores in Tohoku and Kita-Kantou regions, including 93 Japanese-style restaurant Marumatsu stores; 6 Soba restaurant Marumatsu stores; 4 Katsu gourmet stores; 3 Crab Masamune stores; 3 Joshoan stores; 1 Jushoan Marumatsu store; 1 Rotating sushi store; and 12 Shabu Masamune and other stores. The company was formerly known as Marumatsu Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Karula Co.,LTD. in March 1991. Karula Co.,LTD. was founded in 1910 and is headquartered in Tomiya, Japan.
